---
title: "Q1 — CFL lights: Large-sample Z-test"
author: "Upayan Mazumder"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Q1
n <- 100; xbar <- 1220; mu0 <- 1200; s <- 90
se <- s / sqrt(n)
z <- (xbar - mu0)/se
p_value <- 1 - pnorm(z) # one-sided (greater)
z; p_value

xs <- seq(-4,4,length=400); ys <- dnorm(xs)
plot(xs, ys, type='l', main='Q1: Z-test (one-sided)', ylab='Density')
abline(v=z, col='red')
polygon(c(z, xs[xs>z], max(xs)), c(0, ys[xs>z], 0), col=rgb(1,0,0,0.3))
```

Conclusion: compare p-value to 0.05 to decide.
